purpose: DP2(c) mast re-site search — can the 26-ft masts stand anywhere in the stage/event zone under the DURABLE (S1) neighbor ceiling?
method: rasterio scan of committed neighbor_ceiling_S1.tif (commit 4e6d03a): count valid cells whose ceiling >= mast top 638.5 ft NAVD88 (deck 612.5 + 26.0); executed on gentoo 2026-07-21 via .venv python; inline one-off (this file records inputs+outputs; regenerate against the committed raster to verify)
interpretation: 55% of the zone admits the full 26-ft mast under the durable ceiling; qualifying cells span the zone and concentrate toward the receptor (downstage/SE) side, where the descending street-eye rays are still high. Re-siting is FEASIBLE: the DP2(a) seasonal exemption is belt-and-suspenders, not load-bearing. Final mast siting to be selected from qualifying cells at element-adoption time, jointly with screen-geometry needs.
